name: ries-rs
description: Find algebraic equations given their solution - WASM build

scripts.build: RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=-reference-types' rustup run nightly wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg -- --features wasm -Z build-std=panic_abort,std
scripts.build:node: RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=-reference-types' rustup run nightly wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg-node -- --features wasm -Z build-std=panic_abort,std
scripts.build:bundler: RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=-reference-types' rustup run nightly wasm-pack build --target bundler --out-dir pkg-bundler -- --features wasm -Z build-std=panic_abort,std
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:node && npm run build:bundler
scripts.build:threads: RUSTFLAGS='-C target-feature=+atomics,+bulk-memory' rustup run nightly wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg-threads -- --features wasm-threads -Z build-std=panic_abort,std
scripts.test:web:smoke:build: npm run build:web:site && npm run test:web:smoke

author: Maxwell Santoro
